candidate_definitions.text: Convert English text from written expressions into spoken forms

This repository houses my solution to Google's [Text Normalization Challenge - English Language](https://www.kaggle.com/c/text-normalization-challenge-english-language). Most of the magic happens within the converter directory, which is responsible for the actual conversions fro…
